name: Collinsville Building And Loan Association
description_short: Collinsville Building & Loan is a community bank in Illinois offering checking, savings, debit cards, and mortgage lending with a focus on competitive rates and local service.
description_long:
Collinsville Building & Loan Association is a locally-based financial institution headquartered in Collinsville, Illinois (Belt Line Road location). The organization operates as a traditional community bank and is an FDIC member, indicating deposit insurance protection for customers. The company emphasizes that "loans made here, STAY here," reflecting a commitment to local lending practices rather than loan sales to outside entities.

The bank offers a range of deposit and lending products including checking accounts, savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), debit cards, and mortgage loans. On the deposit side, they provide digital banking services through online banking platforms and mobile apps, along with modern features like mobile check deposit, digital wallet integration, and debit card controls. They actively market their Swipe & Save program, which rounds up debit card transactions and transfers the spare change to savings accounts. For mortgage lending, they highlight low down payment options, low closing costs, and competitive mortgage rates as key selling points.

What distinguishes Collinsville Building & Loan is its emphasis on personal customer service and community banking values. The institution offers unique features such as foreign ATM fee reimbursement (up to $10 per statement cycle), overdraft protection linking between accounts, and internal peer-to-peer payments for customers. Their website prominently features accessibility options and educational tools like deposit calculators, budget analysis tools, and retirement planning calculators. The bank maintains traditional customer service channels with a phone number and physical branch location.

However, the company's web presence is minimal and provides limited detail about loan products, interest rates, account fees, or specific lending terms. The website footer is dated "©2026," suggesting minimal recent updates. There is no visible information about account minimum balances, monthly maintenance fees, loan approval requirements, or competitive rate comparisons. For consumers seeking detailed product information or rate transparency, the limited digital presence may require direct phone contact. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Checking accounts with multiple account options
Savings accounts for various financial goals
Mortgage loans with low down payments and competitive rates
Debit cards with ATM access at thousands of locations
Mobile deposit for check deposits via smartphone
Digital wallet integration for debit cards
Swipe & Save program for automatic savings transfers
Online banking and mobile app access
pros: FDIC member bank offering deposit insurance protection
Foreign ATM fee reimbursement up to $10 per statement cycle on debit cards
Swipe & Save program automatically transfers spare change from transactions to savings
Mobile deposit capability allowing check deposits via smartphone photo
Debit card control feature enabling quick enable/disable through online banking or mobile app
Overdraft protection linking between accounts to prevent overdraft fees
Internal peer-to-peer payments available for transfers between CB&L customers
Emphasis on local lending with 'loans made here, STAY here' commitment
cons: Minimal website information about account fees, minimum balances, or interest rates
Limited transparency on mortgage rates and lending terms compared to larger competitors
No visible online account opening or loan application process
Outdated website footer (©2026) suggests infrequent content updates
Single physical location may limit accessibility for customers outside Collinsville area
best_for: Collinsville and surrounding Illinois residents seeking community banking relationships
Homebuyers interested in local mortgage lending with personalized service
Customers wanting to automatically save through debit card round-up programs
People seeking FDIC-insured deposits with traditional banking services
diagnosis: Collinsville Building & Loan is best for Illinois residents in or near Collinsville seeking traditional community banking with personal service and mortgage lending focused on local relationships. The main caveat is the lack of online rate transparency and limited digital account opening options, requiring direct contact with the bank to compare rates and terms against larger financial institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Collinsville Building & Loan is an Illinois community bank offering checking, savings, and mortgage lending.
